item.title: Invent a new feature for our app

output:
Created `docs/product/guest-timezone-selection.md` as a new PM-ready feature spec for guest-selectable timezone viewing on the public booking page.

Updated:
- `.zenve/agents/pm/PRODUCT.md` with the new feature as a `[SHOULD]` priority
- `.zenve/agents/pm/memory/long_term.md` with the durable product decision
- `.zenve/agents/pm/memory/scratch.md` with this run summary

Why this feature:
- It directly supports the north star by reducing booking confusion for cross-timezone meetings.
- It is distinct from the existing booking, availability, and host-management specs.
- The story is bounded, has binary acceptance criteria, and is ready for dev handoff.

RUN_OK: Added PRD for guest timezone selection and updated PM product context and memory
